_comment: Explicit allowlist of routes files that contain mutations but do NOT require a spine event emit. Each entry must have a reviewed reason. Add new entries only after explicit review — do not add to suppress a guard failure without fixing the root cause.

allowlist.reason: Session/context switch — not a data mutation, no business event
User notification preferences — UI config, not auditable business data
Driver UI preferences — not auditable business data
Auth token management — handled by auth layer, not spine
Push notification subscriptions — infra, not auditable business event
Driver report generation — read-oriented, INSERT is a cache/record only
Status suggestion engine — internal read/compute, INSERT is ephemeral
Internal admin email queue management — not customer-facing audit event
Internal sync admin — ops tooling, not auditable business mutation
QBO sync alerts — infra/ops, not spine-auditable
IFTA report preparation — INSERT is a working draft, not a financial commit
Inbound QBO webhook handler — spine emit is handled downstream in the QBO sync service
Inbound Samsara webhook — spine emit handled downstream in telematics pipeline
Samsara vendor mapping — internal integration mapping, not auditable business event
Samsara geofence reconciliation — infra sync, spine handled in geofence service
EDI integration — spine emit handled in downstream EDI processing service
Scheduled reports config — INSERT is a report schedule record, not a financial event
Geofence CRUD — spine emit handled by geofence-engine service on fence events
Geofence breach record — spine emit handled in geofence-engine event pipeline
Auto-deduction policy config — admin config write, spine handled at deduction apply time
Lists hub — metadata/config writes, not auditable financial mutations
